name: communications-marketplace
description: A marketplace of communication and productivity plugins for Claude Code. Install specialized agents, tools, and workflows for various communication needs.

plugins.name: presentation-maker
plugins.description: Multi-agent presentation system. Create McKinsey-quality, board-ready presentations with NBG branding.

plugins.name: creative-toolkit
plugins.description: Reusable creative agents for icon design, data visualization, and device mockups. Brand-configurable with NBG defaults.

plugins.name: email-handler
plugins.description: Email command center. Reviews inbox with briefings, insights, and action flags. Drafts replies matching your communication style. Sends via Outlook. Self-improves by comparing drafts to actual responses.
